series_metadata.series_title: Report-Recipients and Uses of Special Accounts & Special Purpose Accounts
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains the recipients and uses of all GRF special purpose line items and all other funds administered by the department of the previous fiscal year. These reports are required by the legislature. "By the thirtieth day of August of each year, The ODE shall report to to the President of the Senate, the Speaker of the House of Representatives, the Director of Budget & Mgmt, the Legislative Budget Office of Education Oversight, and the Legislative Budget office the recipients and uses of all GRF special purpose line items and all other funds administered by the department of the previous fiscal year..."

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two (2) years ; Electronic: two (2) years
